_readme: Not used at runtime in this repo's remote-connector/pm2 deployment (see README.md). Kept as reference material for a possible future Desktop Extension (.mcpb) local-install packaging.
name: mcp-cowork
description: MCP server exposing a broad integration toolbox (GitHub, Google, Microsoft 365, OVH, o2switch, Steam, WhatsApp, transit, school, Synology NAS) plus a Qdrant-backed long-term memory interface.
long_description: General-purpose MCP tool server, adaptable to any assistant identity. Includes WhatsApp tools via a shared external PM2 daemon (whatsapp-daemon on the reference deployment). Requires a reachable Qdrant instance (local or remote) for persistent memory.
